name: Tempeh Mock Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam tempeh for 20 minutes. Allow to cool enough to handle.
2. Cut into cubes slightly smaller than 1/2 inch.
3. Combine with remaining ingredients and mix lightly.
4. Serve on a bed of lettuce or as a sandwich filling.
I use tofu-based mayonnaise, blend the tofu well with a touch of salt and pepper, lemon juice, and crushed garlic clove.
